description_long: This object is a compact, cylindrical helicopter with a dark, metallic exterior and several white, irregularly shaped panels embedded around its body. The top features a prominent, horizontally oriented main rotor blade with a central hub and a rounded knob at the top. The surface appears rugged and weathered, with visible texturing and pitting, suggesting heavy use or exposure to the elements. The body is adorned with geometric cutouts and raised details, giving it an industrial, almost steampunk aesthetic. No visible cockpit windows, tail rotor, or landing skids are present, and the overall form is highly stylized rather than realistic. The object is solid and robust, with no apparent openings or entry points.
description: A small, cylindrical, dark metallic helicopter with a rugged surface, white panel accents, and a prominent main rotor blade on top.
description_view_0: The front view shows the cylindrical body with a large white panel and the main rotor blade extending horizontally across the top.
description_view_1: This angled rear view highlights the geometric cutouts and the side profile of the main rotor, with more white paneling visible.
description_view_2: The opposite side view displays another large white panel and the full width of the main rotor blade.
description_view_3: This rear-angled view emphasizes the intricate cutouts and the rugged, metallic texture of the body.
attribute_rotor_blades: One main rotor blade, thick and short, made of dark metal with a rough finish and no visible markings.
attribute_landing_skids: not visible; no traditional landing skids or gear present.
